design_units.note: Frontmatter description carries Use-when (primary credit + album name → deep 乐评; positive pop/classical/jazz/soundtrack) and Do-NOT (gear → vince-hifi-review; buying/price; bare lyric translation; non-music). Routing is also externalized as scripts/check_review.py:classify_route and tested via routing_cases.json.

7-step runbook: preflight+route → classify (runtime descriptors, release-form, unit-of-analysis) → research → reason → write → verify (validator gate) → report. Each step names the rules module to load.
Progressive-disclosure split; SKILL.md stays a thin orchestrator.
Music source roster (type/orientation/reliability), breadth-fan-out + depth-deepen plan, triangulation, claim→evidence map, honest-degradation rule. Backing JSON makes traceability machine-checkable.

Externalized: CJK-字 window + genre-adapted section linter + claim→evidence traceability gate; exit non-zero blocks ship. No buying/price advice (behavioral). Honest-degradation enforced via gaps + explicit 资料不足.
17 fixture cases, re-runnable harness importing the scripts/ mechanism. All 10 adversarial edges bound to a passing case.
length-window conformance, ungrounded-claim rate (0), section-coverage pass rate, activation precision — first three read off validator exit semantics.
version 0.1.0 + CHANGELOG; release gate = run_all.py GREEN; rollback note; evidence-gated update rule.

eval_cases.name: in-window standard review (12,000 字, full section coverage) → PASS
eval_cases.evidence: check_review returns [] at 12000 汉字 with all 9 standard sections.

eval_cases.name: Latin/digit/punct padding, only 500 真·汉字 → FAIL floor (CJK-only counting)
eval_cases.evidence: cjk_count==500 despite heavy Latin padding; under-floor error raised.

eval_cases.name: review missing 证据附录 → FAIL on section coverage
classical review separating WORK vs PERFORMANCE + 参考录音/版本比较 → PASS under --class classical
eval_cases.evidence: check_review(klass='classical') returns [] with 作品本体/演绎/参考录音 sections present.

eval_cases.name: pop LP graded under classical lens FAILs work/perf requirement; same body PASSes as standard (template not forced)
eval_cases.evidence: classical lens → non-empty errs (missing 作品本体/演绎/参考录音); standard lens → [].

eval_cases.name: non-standard release form (box set, 逐碟分析) → unit adapts, in-window, no crash
eval_cases.evidence: check_review returns [] with 逐碟与逐曲分析 satisfying the analysis section group.

eval_cases.name: thin-info album with explicit 资料不足/公开资料有限 and no invented specifics → PASS
eval_cases.evidence: validator [] AND review text contains the honest-degradation marker.

eval_cases.name: fact-class claim (personnel) with no source_id → FAIL traceability
fact claim citing a source_id absent from evidence[] → FAIL (green-but-wrong caught)
eval_cases.evidence: error contains 'not in evidence' for ghost_source.

eval_cases.name: classical backing (work+performance facts traced, ref-recording as interpretation) → PASS
obscure backing with gaps + offline_caller_supplied mode → PASS (no fabricated facts)
eval_cases.evidence: validate_backing returns []; only the sleeve-photo fact is traced, the rest are gaps.

eval_cases.name: review + good backing wired via --backing → PASS end-to-end
good review + untraced backing → FAIL via --backing gate
adjacent inputs (耳机/DAC → hifi; lyric translation; buy recs) do NOT route to album-review; positive controls do
eval_cases.evidence: classify_route matches expected_route for all 7 routing_cases.json entries incl. ≥1 album-review positive control.

checklist_coverage.edge: review body at 9,999 中文字符 (one under floor) → validator FAILs on under-length (exit non-zero), not a rounding pass
review body at 15,001 中文字符 (one over ceiling) → validator FAILs on over-length; a 12,000-字 in-window review PASSes
track list / personnel / recording date asserted with no backing source_id → flagged as ungrounded and FAILs the traceability gate (must never be silently emitted as fact)
fabricated discographic fact (e.g. invented guest musician or wrong label) present in backing → claim whose source_id is absent from evidence[] → validator FAILs (green-but-wrong is caught)

classical album: composer (work) vs conductor/orchestra/soloist (performance) → review separates the WORK from the PERFORMANCE and includes a reference-recording comparison section, scored with the same rigor as a pop album

obscure album with thin public information → review degrades honestly with explicit '资料不足/公开资料有限' and contains NO invented track/personnel/date specifics (must not hallucinate to hit the length floor)
genre mismatch: a symphony fed to the pipeline → lens selected by runtime judgment, the pop/songcraft template is NOT forced (and a pop LP does not get a 'movements/乐章' template)

non-standard release form: a single / EP / box set rather than a standard LP → unit of analysis adapts (per-track vs per-disc) and the length/coverage targets still apply or degrade with a stated reason, not a crash

CJK length counting hazard: a review padded with Latin text, digits, and punctuation but few 汉字 → 中文字符 count uses CJK-only counting so padding cannot fake the floor (count reflects actual 汉字, e.g. [一-鿿])
adjacent-skill input: '客观评价这条耳机 / 这个DAC推得动吗' → this skill does NOT activate (routes to vince-hifi-review); 'translate these lyrics' / 'recommend albums to buy' → out of scope, no review produced

actions_resolved.note: research pillar (P0): source roster (references/source-roster.md) + breadth/depth fan-out + claim→evidence map (rules/research-protocol.md) + honest-degradation; backing schema + validate_backing.py make traceability machine-checkable. Cases untraced_fact, fabricated_evidence_ref, obscure_degraded, obscure_backing_passes pass.

testing pillar (P0): scripts/check_review.py adapts check_longform.py — CJK-字 [10000,15000] window, genre-adapted section linter, --backing gate. Fixtures: good / under-floor / over-ceiling / missing-section / untraced / fabricated / obscure / classical / release-form / cjk-padding. 17/17 green via evals/run_all.py.

tdd pillar (P0): wrote cases RED first against an importable wrong-sentinel stub; .skill-engineer/red/red.log holds 17 real 'FAIL <case_id>' lines + exit 1 (not a module-not-found crash). Full-altitude mutation spot-check: broke the CJK regex and the floor compare → length cases flipped RED, then restored GREEN.

design pillar (P0): SKILL.md frontmatter has explicit Use-when + Do-NOT (gear→vince-hifi-review, buying, lyric translation, non-music); 7-step executable protocol; controls externalized as scripts/schema, not prose. Routing tested behaviorally via classify_route over routing_cases.json.
low_context_kb pillar (P1): thin SKILL.md orchestrator (~1267 est tokens) + Modules/Scripts/Assets tables; detail in rules/ + references/ + assets/ loaded on demand.

metrics pillar (P1): rules/metric-plan.md defines length-window conformance, ungrounded-claim rate (target 0), section-coverage pass rate, activation precision — first three observable off validator exit codes.
lifecycle pillar (P2): version 0.1.0 + CHANGELOG.md; release gate = run_all.py GREEN; rollback note; evidence-gated update rule.

verification.evidence: python3 evals/run_all.py → 17/17 PASS, exit 0 (RESULT: GREEN). RED phase: .skill-engineer/red/red.log has 17 'FAIL <case_id>' lines + exit 1 against the wrong-sentinel stub. Mutation spot-check (full altitude): broadening the CJK regex to \S and disabling the floor compare each flipped under_floor_9999 + cjk_padding_fails_floor to FAIL, then restore → GREEN. Both CLIs verified directly with absolute /tmp-style paths: check_review.py exit 0 on good+backing, exit 1 on under-floor; validate_backing.py exit 0/0/0 on good/classical/obscure, exit 1/1 on untraced/fabricated.

notes: SKILL.md ~1267 est tokens — candidate for light Compress (the 'Locked decisions' block and Controls section restate rules/ content); mechanism + fixtures are the load-bearing parts and must stay byte-stable.

The mechanism lives in scripts/check_review.py + scripts/validate_backing.py and is IMPORTED by evals/run_all.py (not reimplemented). evals/schema_check.py is the stdlib draft-07 subset validator reused from vince-hifi-review.
evals/fixtures/_gen_fixtures.py regenerates the exact-字-count review fixtures; the committed .md files are what the harness reads.
Conductor re-run command: python3 /Users/vince/playground/skill-developer/vince-album-review/evals/run_all.py (expect exit 0 + 17 PASS lines).
